calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-457 competence bootstrap-explorer validation (post-build retest): composed RND drive + credit-replay + developmental anneal + budget, OFF (RND plateau) vs ON x {z_world,raw}; does the composition lift floor->competent past the 5.22 plateau (target ~13.05, toward BC 32.72)?
items.note: DIAGNOSTIC substrate-readiness validation (Step-8 of /implement-substrate for mech457_competence_bootstrap_explorer, IMPLEMENTED ree-v3 main 022a284 2026-07-16). experiment_purpose=diagnostic -> excluded from governance scoring; routes to /failure-autopsy. RE-DERIVE BRAKE RELEASED: >=2 non_contributory MECH-457 autopsies (751-750, 752-753-754, 755, 746c-756) but the named upstream substrate is now BUILT and this is a DISTINCT COMPOSED mechanism (new EXQ NUMBER, not a single-axis bolt-on). GOV-REUSE-1: composed-bootstrap ON foraging vs the 5.22 plateau on both reps recorded in NO prior manifest (751 RND-only; 752-756 converters on sparse base) -> run. OFF/ON minted reuse-eligible per rep (include_driver_script_in_hash=False; for the V3-EXQ-750 INV-088 matched-competent retest). ethics all-false/allow. MECH-457 stays candidate/v3_pending; INV-088 candidate/pending_substrate_reconfirmation. Heavy: z_world cotrain ON=3000ep x 3 seeds; cloud.

items.title: SD-025 curiosity-drive selection-bias (drive-mechanism validation): curiosity ON vs OFF over a DA-dense (SD-024) vs sparse benefit terrain; does the curiosity term PROPAGATE into hippocampal CEM elite selection toward higher representational density (leg-1, counterbalanced), read density WEIGHT-INDEPENDENTLY (leg-1c, benefit weights zeroed), and get discounted by a WAKING-only familiarity EMA (leg-2 anti-perseveration + MECH-094 replay control)?
items.note: DIAGNOSTIC substrate-readiness validation (Step-8 of /implement-substrate for SD-025 hippocampal_module.curiosity_drive, IMPLEMENTED ree-v3 main this commit, on SD-024 da_modulated_rbf_density IMPLEMENTED 402285a 2026-07-16). experiment_purpose=diagnostic -> excluded from governance scoring; routes through /failure-autopsy. SCOPE: tests the DRIVE MECHANISM only (does curiosity propagate into CEM selection toward higher density? the propagation MECH-111's broken broadcast-novelty->E3 path could NOT achieve, EXQ-141b/590a) -- NOT the env-constrained full ARC-057 approach-emergence claim (CausalGridWorld cannot test the SD-024 x SD-025 interaction faithfully; a cell is a cell). A PASS is drive-mechanism readiness, does NOT itself promote ARC-057. Re-derive brake: 0 SD-025 autopsies -> not braked. GOV-REUSE-1: curiosity->CEM-selection propagation readout in no prior manifest -> run. OFF (curiosity_weight=0) arm minted reuse-eligible (include_driver_script_in_hash=False). ethics all-false/allow. SD-025 stays candidate. Inline 2-seed Mac PASS/supports (pref_on 1.00 vs off 0.50, prop_delta 0.50; weight-indep 0.00; anti-persev 0.50; MECH-094 replay 0.00; R1 density gap ~75-80, R2 1.00). Light: 8 seeds x 2 arms, ~25min.
